# Nexus UI

统一前端基础设施工程，为所有项目提供设计系统、移动端适配、通用组件和工具函数。

CDN地址（国内加速）：`https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/`

## 引入方式

### CSS（在HTML head中）

```html
<!-- 全量引入（推荐） -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/css/nexus-all.css">
```

### JS（在Vue 3之后引入）

```html
<!-- 基础工具（必须最先引入） -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/nexus-utils.js"></script>

<!-- 按需引入 -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/nexus-api.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/nexus-crud.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/nexus-validators.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/nexus-store.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/user-center-sdk.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/nexus-mobile.js"></script>

<!-- Vue组件 -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-toast.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-modal.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-drawer.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-empty.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-stat-card.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-confirm.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-tab-group.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-pagination.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-breadcrumb.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-error-state.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-data-table.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-radar-chart-util.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-radar-chart.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-login-page.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-skeleton.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-avatar.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-badge.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-layout-sidebar.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-layout-topnav.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/components/nux-form-group.js"></script>

<!-- Composables -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-mobile.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-loading.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-pagination.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-search.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-sort.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-theme.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-sse.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-auth.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-collection.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-crud.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/intohole/nexus-ui@v2.4.0/js/composables/use-form-submit.js"></script>
```

## 主题配置

在 `<body>` 标签上添加应用class即可切换特色色：

```html
<body class="app-one-note">  <!-- 青色 #14b8a6 -->
<body class="app-wisepath">  <!-- 粉红 #ec4899 -->
<body class="app-lion">      <!-- 琥珀 #f59e0b -->
```

可用主题：app-prompt, app-prompt-manager, app-lion, app-golden-fish, app-code-block, app-one-note, app-ai-pet, app-verse-craft, app-financial-kg, app-resume-ai, app-bee-memory, app-chroma, app-mini-deploy, app-usercenter, app-wisepath, app-golden

## 暗色模式

```javascript
// 方式1：手动
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark'); // 开启
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light'); // 关闭

// 方式2：useTheme composable
const { isDark, toggleTheme } = useTheme();
```

## API参考

### NexusApi

```javascript
const api = new NexusApi({ baseUrl: '/api/v1', tokenKey: 'token', onError: (status, msg) => console.error(status, msg) });
api.get('/notes');
api.post('/notes', { title: 'Hello' });
api.createCrud('/notes'); // 返回 { create, list, get, update, delete }
api.download('/notes/export', { format: 'pdf' }); // 返回 Blob
```

### NexusUtils

```javascript
NexusUtils.formatDate(dateString);
NexusUtils.formatDateShort(dateString);
NexusUtils.formatCurrency(amount);
NexusUtils.formatNumber(num, decimals);
NexusUtils.formatPhone(phone);        // 138****1234
NexusUtils.formatMsg(markdownContent); // Markdown简易渲染
NexusUtils.truncateText(text, maxLen);
NexusUtils.debounce(fn, 300);
NexusUtils.throttle(fn, 300);
NexusUtils.generateId();
NexusUtils.deepClone(obj);
NexusUtils.pick(obj, keys);
NexusUtils.omit(obj, keys);
NexusUtils.downloadFile(content, filename, mimeType);
NexusUtils.autoResize(textareaElement);
NexusUtils.formatDateTime(dateString);    // 2026/06/30 10:30:00（含秒）
NexusUtils.formatPercent(value, decimals); // 15.6%
NexusUtils.formatChatTime(timeStr);        // 今天=10:30，其他=06/30 10:30
NexusUtils.formatTime(dateString);         // 别名=formatRelativeTime
```

### NexusStore

```javascript
const store = new NexusStore({ notes: [] }, { persistKeys: ['token', 'user'] });
store.get('notes');
store.set('notes', data);
store.logout();
```

### Vue组件

```javascript
app.component('nux-toast', NuxToast);
app.component('nux-modal', NuxModal);
app.component('nux-drawer', NuxDrawer);
app.component('nux-empty', NuxEmpty);
app.component('nux-stat-card', NuxStatCard);
app.component('nux-confirm', NuxConfirm);
app.component('nux-tab-group', NuxTabGroup);
app.component('nux-pagination', NuxPagination);
app.component('nux-breadcrumb', NuxBreadcrumb);
app.component('nux-error-state', NuxErrorState);
app.component('nux-radar-chart', NuxRadarChart);

// 命令式调用
showToast('操作成功', 'success');
nuxConfirm('确定删除吗？').then(ok => { ... });
```

### nux-radar-chart 雷达图组件

Canvas绘制，支持多数据集对比，自适应高DPI屏幕，ResizeObserver响应式。依赖 `nux-radar-chart-util.js`（提供 `window.NuxRadarDraw` 绘制引擎）。

```html
<nux-radar-chart
  :labels="['风险纪律','护城河价值','成长分类','趋势时机','宏观反射']"
  :datasets="[{label:'贵州茅台', values:[100,96.8,80,83.3,71.4], color:'#3b82f6'}]"
  :max-value="100"
  :show-labels="true"
  :show-legend="true"
  :grid-levels="4">
</nux-radar-chart>
```

Props: labels(Array), datasets(Array[{label,values,color}]), maxValue(Number=100), size(Number=320), showLabels(Boolean=true), showLegend(Boolean=true), gridLevels(Number=4)

### NuxRadarDraw 静态绘制函数

独立的Canvas雷达图绘制工具，无需Vue环境，适用于v-html渲染场景。

```javascript
NuxRadarDraw.draw(canvas, {
  labels: ['风险纪律','护城河价值','成长分类','趋势时机','宏观反射'],
  datasets: [{label:'贵州茅台', values:[100,96.8,80,83.3,71.4], color:'#3b82f6'}],
  maxValue: 100, showLabels: true, showLegend: true, gridLevels: 4
});
```

### Composables

```javascript
const { isMobile, mobileMenuOpen, toggleMenu, closeMenu } = useMobile();
const { loading, error, withLoading } = useLoading();
const { pagination, totalPages, hasNext, hasPrev, nextPage, prevPage, setTotal } = usePagination();
const { keyword, isSearchMode, doSearch, clearSearch } = useSearch();
const { sortField, sortOrder, toggleSort, sortList } = useSort();
const { isDark, toggleTheme } = useTheme();
const { status, data, connect, disconnect } = useSSE();
const { isAuthenticated, isAdmin, hasRole, requireAuth } = useAuth(store);
const { items, total, setItems, addItem, updateItem, deleteItem } = useCollection();
const { items, total, loading, error, pagination, totalPages, fetchList, create, update, remove, goToPage, doSearch, toggleSort, setFilter, refresh } = useCrud(config);
const { submitting, error, success, submitDisabled, submit, reset, wrap } = useFormSubmit(options);
```

## 通用CRUD工厂 createNexusCrud

封装通用CRUD操作，自动处理auth header和error handling，支持分页/搜索/排序。依赖 `nexus-api.js`。需先引入 `nexus-crud.js`。

```javascript
const crud = createNexusCrud({
    api: nexusApi,
    basePath: '/notes',
    idField: 'id',
    paramNames: { page: 'page', pageSize: 'page_size', search: 'q', sort: 'sort_by', sortOrder: 'sort_order' },
    listAdapter: (resp) => ({ items: resp.data, total: resp.total }),
    itemAdapter: (resp) => resp.data
});

crud.list({ page: 1, pageSize: 20, search: 'foo', sortField: 'created_at', sortOrder: 'desc', filters: { status: 'active' } });
crud.listPaged(1, 20);
crud.search('foo');
crud.sortBy('created_at', 'desc');
crud.get(123);
crud.create({ title: 'Hello' });
crud.update(123, { title: 'Updated' });
crud.remove(123);
crud.batchRemove([1, 2, 3]);
crud.sub('chapters', 123);
crud.action('publish', { id: 123, method: 'POST', data: { foo: 'bar' } });
```

返回方法清单：`list / listRaw / get / create / update / remove / batchRemove / listPaged / search / sortBy / sub / action`。

## NexusApi 扩展方法（v2.6+）

```javascript
const api = new NexusApi({ baseUrl: '/api/v1', tokenKey: 'token' });

api.crud('/notes');
api.crud('/notes', { idField: 'uuid', paramNames: { page: 'p', pageSize: 'size' } });
api.uploadFile('/upload', fileInput.files[0], { fieldName: 'file', filename: 'custom.txt', fields: { category: 'doc' } });
api.download('/export', { format: 'pdf' });
api.createCrud('/notes');
```

`api.crud(resource, options)` 返回增强版CRUD客户端（依赖 createNexusCrud，若未引入则降级为 createCrud）；`api.uploadFile(url, file, options)` 直接接受 File/Blob 对象，自动包装为 FormData；`api.download(url, params)` 返回 Blob，由调用方决定如何保存。

## useCrud 组合式函数

封装完整CRUD流程的状态管理：list/detail/创建/更新/删除/分页/搜索/排序/筛选。需先引入 `nexus-crud.js` 和 `use-crud.js`。

```javascript
const { items, total, loading, error, pagination, totalPages, hasNext, hasPrev,
        search, sortField, sortOrder, filters, isEmpty,
        fetchList, fetchDetail, create, update, remove, batchRemove,
        goToPage, nextPage, prevPage, setPageSize,
        doSearch, clearSearch, toggleSort, setSort,
        setFilter, setFilters, clearFilters,
        refresh, reset } = useCrud({
    api: nexusApi,
    basePath: '/notes',
    idField: 'id',
    defaultPageSize: 20,
    defaultSortField: 'created_at',
    defaultSortOrder: 'desc',
    autoLoad: true,
    refreshAfterMutation: true,
    onError: (e, type) => console.error(type, e),
    onCreated: (item) => showToast('创建成功', 'success'),
    onUpdated: (item, id) => showToast('更新成功', 'success'),
    onRemoved: (id) => showToast('已删除', 'success')
});

await fetchList();
await create({ title: 'Hello' });
await update(123, { title: 'Updated' });
await remove(123);
await goToPage(2);
await doSearch('keyword');
await toggleSort('created_at');
await setFilter('status', 'active');
```

## useFormSubmit 组合式函数

封装表单提交流程：自动管理 submitting/error/success 状态，自动调用 Toast。需先引入 `use-form-submit.js`。

```javascript
const { submitting, error, errorMessage, success, successMessage, lastResult,
        submitDisabled, hasError, hasSuccess,
        submit, run, wrap, reset, clearError, clearSuccess } = useFormSubmit({
    successMessage: '保存成功',
    errorMessage: '',
    showToastOnSuccess: true,
    showToastOnError: true
});

async function handleSave() {
    await submit(() => api.post('/notes', form), {
        successMessage: '创建成功',
        onSuccess: (result) => { router.push(`/notes/${result.id}`); },
        onError: (e) => { console.error(e); }
    });
}

const wrappedSubmit = wrap(() => api.post('/notes', form), { successMessage: '创建成功' });
```

错误信息自动通过 `mapHttpError`（来自 `nexus-api-error.js`）翻译为中文。Toast 优先调用 `window.showToast`，缺失时降级到 console。

## NexusValidators 通用表单验证器

零依赖的表单验证库，所有验证器都是高阶函数（返回 `(value, allValues?) => string`，空字符串表示通过）。需引入 `nexus-validators.js`。

```javascript
const V = NexusValidators;

const rules = {
    username: [V.required('请输入用户名'), V.minLength(3), V.maxLength(20)],
    email: [V.required(), V.email()],
    phone: [V.phone()],
    age: [V.number(), V.range(18, 99)],
    website: [V.url()],
    code: [V.pattern(/^\d{6}$/, '请输入6位数字')],
    idCard: [V.idCard()],
    status: [V.oneOf(['active', 'inactive'])]
};

const form = { username: 'ab', email: 'invalid', phone: '13800138000', age: 25 };
const { valid, errors } = NexusValidators.validateForm(form, rules);
if (!valid) {
    console.log(errors.username);
    console.log(errors.email);
}

const usernameValidator = V.composeValidators(V.required(), V.minLength(3), V.maxLength(20));
const err = usernameValidator('ab');
```

可用验证器：`required / requiredIf / minLength / maxLength / email / phone / url / number / integer / range / min / max / pattern / idCard / oneOf / custom`。

辅助方法：`composeValidators(...validators) / validateField(value, validators, allValues?) / validateForm(form, rules) / validateFields(form, fields, rules) / makeFieldValidator(rules) / isEmpty(value)`。
